targets.query: from(bucket:"ems-baseline") |> range(start:-1m) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="ems") |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="value") |> aggregateWindow(every:5s,fn:count) |> last()

union(tables:[from(bucket:"ems-filtered") |> range(start:-1m) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="ems_float" or r._measurement=="ems_int") |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="value") |> aggregateWindow(every:5s,fn:count) |> last()])
from(bucket:"ems-baseline") |> range(start:-1m) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="ems") |> count() |> map(fn:(r)=>({r with _value: 16.0}))

panels.title: Row ingestion rate — Baseline (red) vs Filtered A+B (green)

targets.query: from(bucket:"ems-baseline") |> range(start:v.timeRangeStart,stop:v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="ems") |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="value") |> aggregateWindow(every:5s,fn:count) |> map(fn:(r)=>({r with _field:"Baseline"}))

from(bucket:"ems-filtered") |> range(start:v.timeRangeStart,stop:v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="ems_float" or r._measurement=="ems_int") |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="value") |> aggregateWindow(every:5s,fn:count) |> sum() |> map(fn:(r)=>({r with _field:"Filtered"}))

panels.title: Cumulative rows stored — Baseline vs Filtered

targets.query: from(bucket:"ems-baseline") |> range(start:v.timeRangeStart,stop:v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="ems") |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="value") |> aggregateWindow(every:5s,fn:count) |> cumulativeSum() |> map(fn:(r)=>({r with _field:"Baseline cumulative"}))

from(bucket:"ems-filtered") |> range(start:v.timeRangeStart,stop:v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="ems_float" or r._measurement=="ems_int") |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="value") |> aggregateWindow(every:5s,fn:count) |> sum() |> cumulativeSum() |> map(fn:(r)=>({r with _field:"Filtered cumulative"}))

import "array"
array.from(rows: [
  {scenario: "Baseline (no filter)",        reduction: "0%",    write_rate: "13,464 rows/min", annual_1unit: "9.66B rows",  fleet_50u: "58 TB/yr",  status: "Current Longbow production"},
  {scenario: "Conservative (Filter A+B)",   reduction: "−26.8%", write_rate: "9,853 rows/min",  annual_1unit: "7.07B rows",  fleet_50u: "42 TB/yr",  status: "Safe, deploy immediately"},
  {scenario: "Moderate (A+B+float COV)",    reduction: "−40.6%", write_rate: "7,993 rows/min",  annual_1unit: "5.74B rows",  fleet_50u: "34 TB/yr",  status: "Requires EMS change or Telegraf dedup"},
  {scenario: "Aggressive (A+B+p95 deadband)",reduction: "−85.5%", write_rate: "1,956 rows/min",  annual_1unit: "1.40B rows",  fleet_50u: "8.4 TB/yr", status: "Most impactful; needs per-signal tuning"}
])
